name: update_feishu_task
description: Updates an existing Feishu task. Provide task_guid and the fields to change. Supports summary, description, due, completed_at (use "0" to restore to unfinished), repeat_rule, start, mode, is_milestone. Also supports addAssigneeIds/addFollowerIds and removeAssigneeIds/removeFollowerIds for members; addReminderRelativeMinutes to add a reminder (task must have due; only one per task—remove first if needed) and removeReminderIds (from task.reminders[].id) to remove reminders. At least one update is required.

taskGuid.description: Task GUID (required). Global unique ID of the task. Max 100 characters.

dueTimestamp.description: Timestamp in milliseconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC. Example: "1675454764000".

isDueAllDay.description: Whether the time is all-day. If true, only the date part of timestamp is used.

completedAt.description: Completion timestamp in ms (optional). Omit or "0" = unfinished; set to create a completed task.

mode.description: Task mode (optional): 1 = all assignees must complete, 2 = any assignee can complete. Default 2.

isMilestone.description: Whether the task is a milestone (optional). Default false.

addAssigneeIds.description: Assignee open_ids (optional). Use open_id from get_feishu_users. Max 50.

addFollowerIds.description: Follower open_ids (optional). Use open_id from get_feishu_users. Max 50.

addReminderRelativeMinutes.description: Reminder: minutes before due (0 = at due time, 30 = 30 min before). Task must have due; only one reminder per task—remove existing first if needed.
